summary: P1.2: extract PROMPT_VERSION constant in guru/prompt.py (single source of truth for prompt-template versioning)

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: v3.md §4.1 + v3-impl.md Phase 1 step 4 say 'extract build_prompt() from tag_concepts.py to guru/prompt.py'. But guru/prompt.py already has a build_prompt() for the retrieval/chat side (RetrievedChunk → user-facing prompt) — totally different function from scripts/tag_concepts.py:build_prompt (chunk → LLM tagging request). Naming collision. The v3 author didn't anticipate this. Minimal-disruption interpretation: add PROMPT_VERSION constant to guru/prompt.py per spec, but keep the tagging build_prompt() in scripts/tag_concepts.py where its caller and SYSTEM_PROMPT live. Constant has a clear comment pointing to the function it governs. Future ticket can extract build_prompt to guru/tagging.py if cleaner module separation is wanted.

resolution.note: PROMPT_VERSION='v1' added to guru/prompt.py per v3.md §4.1. Comment notes the constant governs scripts/tag_concepts.py:build_prompt (tagging-time prompt), distinct from the retrieval-time build_prompt() in the same module. 47 tests still green.
